news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms proper use of proceeds from listed commercial papers as per SEBI guidelines.
Details of CPs issued and outstanding in Q4 FY25-26, including ISIN codes and maturity dates, are disclosed.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms proper use of proceeds from listed commercial papers as per SEBI guidelines.
Details of CPs issued and outstanding in Q4 FY25-26, including ISIN codes and maturity dates, are disclosed.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp's subsidiary, South Kalamb Power Transmission, sold to Adani Energy for ₹12.53 crore.
Sale is at arm's length, not a slump sale, with minimal revenue contribution.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp's subsidiary, South Kalamb Power Transmission, sold to Adani Energy for ₹12.53 crore.
Sale is at arm's length, not a slump sale, with minimal revenue contribution.

news.title:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.
news.summary:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd. confirms timely interest and principal redemption for bonds under SEBI Reg. 57(1).
Payments were made via NEFT/RTGS, covering bond series 7.66% and 7.70% on due dates as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd. confirms timely interest and principal redemption for bonds under SEBI Reg. 57(1).
Payments were made via NEFT/RTGS, covering bond series 7.66% and 7.70% on due dates as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.
news.summary:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.

news.title:
Vedanta, PFC, and 10 others will go ex-date next week for dividends, bonuses, and stock splits.
India Glycols, Gujarat Intrux offer high dividends; Kilitch Drugs, Times Green announce 1:1 bonus issues.
news.summary:
Vedanta, PFC, and 10 others will go ex-date next week for dividends, bonuses, and stock splits.
India Glycols, Gujarat Intrux offer high dividends; Kilitch Drugs, Times Green announce 1:1 bonus issues.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation declares Rs 4/share dividend with ex-date March 23, 2026.
The company shows returns of 8.5% in 6 months and 421.6% over 4 years.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation declares Rs 4/share dividend with ex-date March 23, 2026.
The company shows returns of 8.5% in 6 months and 421.6% over 4 years.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest redemption payment for bonds as per SEBI regulations.
Interest of Rs. 35.9 Cr was paid on bond series ISIN FNE134E08F06 due on 12/6/2026 via NEFT/RTGS.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest redemption payment for bonds as per SEBI regulations.
Interest of Rs. 35.9 Cr was paid on bond series ISIN FNE134E08F06 due on 12/6/2026 via NEFT/RTGS.

news.title: Power Finance Corporation sets 23 March 2026 as record date for 4th interim dividend.
news.summary: Power Finance Corporation sets 23 March 2026 as record date for 4th interim dividend.

news.title:
PFC board approves raising ₹1.6 lakh crore in FY26-27 via bonds, loans, CP.
PFC declares ₹3.25/share fourth interim dividend; record date 23 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
PFC board approves raising ₹1.6 lakh crore in FY26-27 via bonds, loans, CP.
PFC declares ₹3.25/share fourth interim dividend; record date 23 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation's subsidiary GIPCL was dissolved on 16.03.2026.
GIPCL, incorporated in 2008 for a 4000 MW project, ceased after 2025 approval.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation's subsidiary GIPCL was dissolved on 16.03.2026.
GIPCL, incorporated in 2008 for a 4000 MW project, ceased after 2025 approval.

news.title:
PFC sold its Maharashtra transmission subsidiary to Power Grid for Rs. 8.04 crore.
The sale, completed on 12 Mar 2026, is not a related party or slump sale.
news.summary:
PFC sold its Maharashtra transmission subsidiary to Power Grid for Rs. 8.04 crore.
The sale, completed on 12 Mar 2026, is not a related party or slump sale.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp's NES Dharashiv Transmission sold to Montecarlo for ₹3.61 Cr on 12th March 2026.
NES Dharashiv focused on renewable energy evacuation; sale not a related party or slump deal.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp's NES Dharashiv Transmission sold to Montecarlo for ₹3.61 Cr on 12th March 2026.
NES Dharashiv focused on renewable energy evacuation; sale not a related party or slump deal.

news.title:
Sakhigopal Integrated Power Co., subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation, dissolved by Registrar w.e.f. 09.03.2026.
Closure approved by Ministry of Power; SIPCL not a material subsidiary, initially formed for a 4000 MW Odisha project.
news.summary:
Sakhigopal Integrated Power Co., subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation, dissolved by Registrar w.e.f. 09.03.2026.
Closure approved by Ministry of Power; SIPCL not a material subsidiary, initially formed for a 4000 MW Odisha project.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation confirms timely interest/redemption payment for bond series via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISIN INE134E08FL2, issue size Rs. 137,000 lakhs, interest Rs. 12,330 lakhs.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation confirms timely interest/redemption payment for bond series via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISIN INE134E08FL2, issue size Rs. 137,000 lakhs, interest Rs. 12,330 lakhs.

news.title:
PFC Board to meet on March 17, 2026, for bond issuance plans and 4th interim dividend declaration.
Trading window for PFC shares and securities closed; designated persons advised not to trade.
news.summary:
PFC Board to meet on March 17, 2026, for bond issuance plans and 4th interim dividend declaration.
Trading window for PFC shares and securities closed; designated persons advised not to trade.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp plans a market borrowing program for FY 2026-27.
The program aims to address funding requirements of the company.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp plans a market borrowing program for FY 2026-27.
The program aims to address funding requirements of the company.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payment on NCDs via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISINs, amounts paid (Rs. 24849.6L, Rs. 22755L), and payment dates (03 MAR 2026).
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payment on NCDs via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISINs, amounts paid (Rs. 24849.6L, Rs. 22755L), and payment dates (03 MAR 2026).

news.title:
PFC subsidiary Saswad Transmission transferred to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission for ₹3.8 crore.
The arm's length transaction completed on 26.02.2026; not a slump sale.
news.summary:
PFC subsidiary Saswad Transmission transferred to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission for ₹3.8 crore.
The arm's length transaction completed on 26.02.2026; not a slump sale.

news.title:
PFC accepts bids worth ₹60B for 2-yr and 10-yr bonds.
The company will pay an annual coupon, bankers confirmed.
news.summary:
PFC accepts bids worth ₹60B for 2-yr and 10-yr bonds.
The company will pay an annual coupon, bankers confirmed.
